rationale: The cited paper is a major meta-analysis of brand advertising elasticities (751 short-term and 402 long-term estimates), and the citing paper’s core contribution is estimating channel-level GRP-based advertising elasticities and using them for budget allocation. Given this direct construct overlap (advertising elasticity) and a verified DOI match, the citation is plausibly serving as a benchmark/foundational source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
